nasb.text: So the Lord allowed those nations to remain, not driving them out quickly; and He did not give them into the hand of Joshua.

esv.text: So the Lord left those nations, not driving them out quickly, and he did not give them into the hand of Joshua.

cnv.text: 這樣，耶和華留下這些國的民，不迅速把他們趕走，也不把他們交在約書亞手裡。

ccb.text: 这就是为什么耶和华留下那些外族人，没有立刻把他们赶走，也没有把他们交在约书亚手中。
